/voicessc_012040_0040 空間上に、高エネルギー反応。強力なエネミーが来ます！
/voicessc_012040_0050 ……ダークファルスの出現を確認。
/voicessc_012050_0010 /atime0.5 ……員……、ますか!?　……なら返事……さい！　……が……のか……を！

/voicessc_012060_0010 通信、回復しました！
バイタル確認。そちらの様子もモニターできています。

/voicessc_012060_0030 /atime0.5 これは……、出現時よりダークファルスが弱体化しています！
攻撃を続けてください！
/voicessc_012060_0070 ダークファルス、さらに弱体化。行けます！

/voicessc_012060_0050 /atime0.5 セントラルキャノンの発射準備、最終段階に移行。
もう少しだけ……頑張ってください！
/voicessc_012040_0040 Detecting a large energy reading from the sky. A powerful enemy is coming!
/voicessc_012040_0050 It's... Dark Falz.
/voicessc_012050_0010 /atime0.5 Can any......me!? If......please reply! ......what's...on...... Please!
/voicessc_012060_0010 The signal's been restored! Checking its vitals... I can monitor your stats now, too.
/voicessc_012060_0030 /atime0.5 It's... weaker than when it first appeared! You're really making progress! Continue your attack!
/voicessc_012060_0070 Dark Falz is even weaker now. We can do this!
/voicessc_012060_0050 /atime0.5 The Central Cannon preparation is now in the final stage. Hang in there just a little longer!
/voicessc_012040_0020 どうやらお互い別の合流地点にいるようね。
/voicessc_012040_0020 It looks like we each went to different locations.
/voicessc_012040_0010 キミ、今どのあたりにいる？
/voicessc_012040_0030 今からこっちの座標を送るから、合流しよう……。
/voicessc_012040_0010 Hey, where are you right now?
/voicessc_012040_0030 I'll send you my coordinates now, so let's meet up.

/voicessc_012040_0060 /atime0.5 キャノンの発射までは、もう少し時間がかかる。
みんな、足止めを頼む……。
/voicessc_012040_0060 /atime0.5 It'll take a little more time before the cannon is ready. Please do your best to slow it down.
